title: Unfortunately Yours
author: Tessa Bailey
prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is verbatim from the "Unfortunately Yours" book by Tessa Bailey?
Options:
A. Natalie followed, smiling and thanking people who congratulated her as she passed. When they reached a quiet corner of the train car, Corinne kept a serene smile on her face, but there was no mistaking the temper in her eyes. Dont you think it would have been nice to give us a little prewarning before roping your brother and me into this stunt? Yes, I do, actually. That was my intention In the space of thirty minutes, you and this . . . ape have turned us into a spectacle. All at once, Natalies blood rose to a rollicking boil. Hes a war veteran.
B. Natalie followed Corinne, grinning and expressing gratitude to people who congratulated her while passing. As they got to a peaceful corner of the train car, Corinne kept a serene smile on her face, but her temper was obvious in her eyes. Wouldn't it have been nice to warn us a bit before bringing your brother and me into this stunt? I actually agree, that was my intention. In thirty minutes, you and this...brute have turned us into a spectacle. All at once, Natalie was furious. He's an ex-soldier.  
C. Natalie trailed behind, beaming and thanking individuals who offered congratulations as she went by. When they arrived at a quiet nook of the train car, Corinne maintained a calm smile, but anger shone in her eyes. Don't you think some advance notice before involving your brother and I in this scheme would have been good? You're right, that was my plan. In half an hour, you and this...neanderthal have made us a sideshow. Suddenly, Natalie was livid. He's a former soldier.
D. Natalie walked behind Corinne, smiling and thanking individuals who congratulated her as she went by. When they arrived at a quiet area of the train car, Corinne maintained a calm smile on her face, but her anger was evident in her eyes. Don't you think it would have been good to give us a little advance notice before involving your brother and I in this scheme? Yes, I really do think that. That was my plan. In the span of thirty minutes, you and this...ape have made us into a show. Suddenly, Natalie became extremely angry. He's a war veteran.
Answer:

Dont you think it would have been nice to give us a little prewarning before roping your brother and me into this stunt? Yes, I do, actually. That was my intention In the space of thirty minutes, you and this . . . ape have turned us into a spectacle. All at once, Natalies blood rose to a rollicking boil. Hes a war veteran.

As they got to a peaceful corner of the train car, Corinne kept a serene smile on her face, but her temper was obvious in her eyes. In thirty minutes, you and this...brute have turned us into a spectacle. All at once, Natalie was furious. He's an ex-soldier.
